name: omarchy_omarchy_on...
content:
Omarchy on... 
Appe M1/M2 chips 
Asahi Aarm is a version of Arch for Appe M1/M2 computers buit on top of Asahi Linux.
You can get Omarchy running on top of that with some effort. See the user-driven guide.
Appe Virtua Machine 
You can aso insta Omarchy inside a Paraes VM. Quite the cumbersome process, but
there's a user-driven guide for that too.
VirtuaBox 
VirtuaBox is a popuar VM runner. You can run Omarchy inside that too. But performance
probaby won't be great.
VMware Workstation on Windows 11 
Another popuar VM runner for Windows. Omarchy has been setup inside of that as we.
CachyOS 
CachyOS is a fork of Arch with a range of performance optimizations appied. I was never
abe to see any advantage with my workoads in terms of performance, but if you want to
give it a try, here's a guide to running Omarchy on top of CachyOS.
Steam Deck 
The Steam Deck runs on Arch, which means you can run Omarchy on your Steam Deck.
Atynbek Orumbayev has a fu setup script and expanation on how to do it. How coo is
that!
NixOS 
Omarchy is reay Arch + Hyprand, but Henry Sipp has ported the essence of the setup to
NixOS. So if you've been nix-pied, here's a good starting point. It may or may not stay
up-to-date with the atest Omarchy changes, but it's pretty coo none the ess!
Something ese! 
If you're trying to get Omarchy running on a configuration that isn't the defaut, you shoud
join the #omarchy-on-other channe on our community Discord.
Omarchy on... · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/79/omarchy-on
